RELEASE UNDER THE PRESIDENT JOHN F. KENNEDY ASSASSINATION ACT OF 1992
S E C R E T
N F C/SES C/EUR6, C7SIA/IC. C/SIA/FL
S E C FR E T 892945E N0V 77 STAFF
S E C R E T 090945Z NOV 77 STAFF
, sENs11Va SYPAI1a=R SR= 1NpiCATs Tt o, LZ44---
SENSITIVE SYMPATHIZER SOURCE INDICATES THAT ON
3 OC7C5ER W1LLE OLTMANS MADE APPINTENT MEET W1T
3 OCTOBER WILLEM OLTMANS MADE APPOINTMENT MEET WITH
CUBAN AM35SADCR, TH HAGUE. OLTANS STATED HE GOING ''To
CUBAN AMBASSADOR, THE HAGUE. OLTANS STATED HE GOING ''TO
ie 31CA ON aeTF'' AND TAT HE ' 1S INDEE5 PFEPARED To Go
AMERICA ON 18TH AND THAT HE IS PREPARED TO GO
7 TE SEGINNINS OF NOVEMBER AS ARRANGED''.
AT THE BEGINNING OF NOVEMBER AS ARRANGED.
2. DRING D1SCUSSION, OLTMANS SA1D HE ALS0 HAD
2. DURING DISCUSSION, OLTMANS SAID HE ALSO HAD
V1S1T SCHDLE WITH RUSS1AN ABASSADOR ROANV F0R
VISIT SCHEDULED WITH RUSSIAN AMBASSADOR ROMANOV FOR
3 OCT0SER AND ANTED COMBINE TWD VISITS F0R SAE DAY.
3 OCTOBER AND WANTED COMBINE TWO VISITS FOR SAME DAY.
OLTANS WAS TOL AN ATTEPT BY CUBSAN AMSASSADOR T0
OLTMANS WAS TOLD AN ATTEMPT BY CUBAN AMSASSADOR TO
SCEUDLE EET W1TH HIM DURING SEEK 25 SEPTEMEER HAD
SCHEUDLE MEET W1TH HIM DURING SEEK 25 SEPTEMEER HAD
BEEN UNSUCCESSFL 8ECAUSE OLTANS C0ULD NOT 8E REACHED.
BEEN UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE OLTMANS COULD NOT BE REACHED.
DLIANS STATED E HAD BEEN 1N S0VIET UNION THEN.
OLTMANS STATED HE HAD BEEN IN SOVIET UNION THEN.
3. A3OVE EVIDENCE f OLTMAN'S CONTINUIG CL0SE
3. ABOVE EVIDENCE OF OLTMAN'S CONTINUING CLOSE
C0NTACT W1T8 CVAN AND SOVIET DIPLOATS AND HIS RECENT
CONTACT WITH CUBAN AND SOVIET DIPLOMATS AND HIS RECENT
TRAVEL T0 THE USSF AND APPARENT CURRENT TRAVEL T0 CU8A
TRAVEL TO THE USSR AND APPARENT CURRENT TRAVEL TO CUBA
S E C R E T
